description: Unusual activation methods and behavioral demands. Ritual-like hoops to jump through before the item cooperates.
limitations: True Name
Seventy-seven syllables, perfectly pronounced. Miss one and the item pretends you never spoke at all.
Held Breath
The lungs must be still. One gasp, one stolen breath, and the power scatters before it forms.
Blind Draw
Reach for it with your eyes shut. Open them too soon and the moment is lost, the magic scattered.
Grateful Hand
Sincerity is the key. Thank it and mean it, or it sits cold in your palm like a dead thing.
Dancer's Stance
It wakes to rhythm. The wielder must move, must sway, must dance. Stillness earns nothing from this item.
Herald's Call
It insists on being announced. Loudly. By name. Every single time, no matter how inconvenient.
Vow of Silence
One spoken word and the effect dies. The item demands absolute quiet from the moment of activation.
Deep Soak
It must drink first. A full minute submerged in water before it will consent to do anything at all.
Grudge Holder
It remembers the last foe it struck and refuses to strike the same one again immediately. Variety or nothing.
Riddle Gate
A new riddle every time, spoken aloud, solved correctly. Wrong answers earn nothing but the item's contempt.
